examples.sentence: 彼の演技が素晴らしくてならない。
examples.translation: I can’t help but be amazed at his wonderful performance.
examples.translationEn: I can’t help but be amazed at his wonderful performance
examples.romaji: Kare no engi ga subarashikute naranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I can’t help but be amazed at his wonderful performance

examples.sentence: 合格発表が気になってならない。
examples.translation: I can’t stop worrying about the exam results.
examples.translationEn: I can’t stop worrying about the exam results
examples.romaji: Gōkaku happyō ga ki ni natte naranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I can’t stop worrying about the exam results

examples.sentence: 友達が引っ越してしまって、寂しくてならない。
examples.translation: My friend moved away, and I feel unbearably lonely.
examples.translationEn: My friend moved away, and I feel unbearably lonely
examples.romaji: Tomodachi ga hikkoshite shimatte, sabishikute naranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: My friend moved away, and I feel unbearably lonely

examples.sentence: 初めての海外旅行で、不安でならない。
examples.translation: It’s my first trip abroad, and I’m extremely anxious.
examples.translationEn: It’s my first trip abroad, and I’m extremely anxious
examples.romaji: Hajimete no kaigai ryokō de, fuan de naranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It’s my first trip abroad, and I’m extremely anxious

examples.sentence: いつも助けてもらってばかりはいられない。
examples.translation: I can’t just keep letting people help me all the time.
examples.translationEn: I can’t just keep letting people help me all the time
examples.romaji: Itsumo tasukete moratte bakari wa irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I can’t just keep letting people help me all the time

examples.sentence: 好きな仕事ばかりしてはいられない。
examples.translation: I can’t afford to only do the work I love.
examples.translationEn: I can’t afford to only do the work I love
examples.romaji: Suki na shigoto bakari shite wa irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I can’t afford to only do the work I love

examples.sentence: 親に頼ってばかりはいられない。
examples.translation: I can’t keep depending on my parents forever.
examples.translationEn: I can’t keep depending on my parents forever
examples.romaji: Oya ni tayotte bakari wa irarenai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I can’t keep depending on my parents forever

examples.sentence: 休んでばかりはいられない。仕事もしなくちゃ。
examples.translation: I can’t just keep taking breaks; I have work to do as well.
examples.translationEn: I can’t just keep taking breaks; I have work to do as well
examples.romaji: Yasunde bakari wa irarenai. Shigoto mo shinakucha.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I can’t just keep taking breaks; I have work to do as well

examples.sentence: 彼は優秀な学生ではないか。
examples.translation: Isn’t he an excellent student?
examples.translationEn: Isn’t he an excellent student?
examples.romaji: Kare wa yūshū na gakusei de wa nai ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Isn’t he an excellent student?

examples.sentence: この料理は美味しいではないか。
examples.translation: Isn’t this dish delicious?
examples.translationEn: Isn’t this dish delicious?
examples.romaji: Kono ryōri wa oishii de wa nai ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Isn’t this dish delicious?

examples.sentence: あなたは彼女の友達ではないか。
examples.translation: Aren’t you her friend?
examples.translationEn: Aren’t you her friend?
examples.romaji: Anata wa kanojo no tomodachi de wa nai ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Aren’t you her friend?

examples.sentence: 明日は休みではないか。
examples.translation: Tomorrow’s a day off, right?
examples.translationEn: Tomorrow’s a day off, right?
examples.romaji: Ashita wa yasumi de wa nai ka.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Tomorrow’s a day off, right?

examples.sentence: ここでタバコを吸ってはならない。
examples.translation: You must not smoke here.
examples.translationEn: You must not smoke here
examples.romaji: Koko de tabako o sutte wa naranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: You must not smoke here

examples.sentence: 秘密を他人に話してはならない。
examples.translation: You cannot reveal this secret to others.
examples.translationEn: You cannot reveal this secret to others
examples.romaji: Himitsu o tanin ni hanashite wa naranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: You cannot reveal this secret to others

examples.sentence: この部屋に入ってはならない。
examples.translation: You must not enter this room.
examples.translationEn: You must not enter this room
examples.romaji: Kono heya ni haitte wa naranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: You must not enter this room

examples.sentence: 飲酒運転をしてはならない。
examples.translation: You must not drink and drive.
examples.translationEn: You must not drink and drive
examples.romaji: Inshu unten o shite wa naranai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: You must not drink and drive

examples.sentence: 彼は試験に合格するために、徹夜してまで勉強しました。
examples.translation: He studied to the point of staying up all night in order to pass the exam.
examples.translationEn: He studied to the point of staying up all night in order to pass the exam
examples.romaji: Kare wa shiken ni gōkaku suru tame ni, tetsuya shite made benkyō shimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He studied to the point of staying up all night in order to pass the exam

examples.sentence: この商品がほしかったので、朝早く起きてまで並んで買いました。
examples.translation: I wanted this product so much that I went so far as to get up early and wait in line to buy it.
examples.translationEn: I wanted this product so much that I went so far as to get up early and wait in line to buy it
examples.romaji: Kono shōhin ga hoshikatta node, asa hayaku okite made narande kaimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I wanted this product so much that I went so far as to get up early and wait in line to buy it

examples.sentence: 彼女は彼を助けるために、お金を借りてまで手術代を払いました。
examples.translation: In order to help him, she even borrowed money to pay for the surgery.
examples.translationEn: In order to help him, she even borrowed money to pay for the surgery
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa kare o tasukeru tame ni, okane o karite made shujutsudai o haraimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: In order to help him, she even borrowed money to pay for the surgery

examples.sentence: 部長はそのプロジェクトを成功させるために、休日も働いてまで取り組んでいます。
examples.translation: The manager is even working on holidays to make the project a success.
examples.translationEn: The manager is even working on holidays to make the project a success
examples.romaji: Buchō wa sono purojekuto o seikō saseru tame ni, kyūjitsu mo hataraite made torikunde imasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The manager is even working on holidays to make the project a success

examples.sentence: 彼は毎日勉強しているから、試験に合格して当然だ。
examples.translation: Since he studies every day, it's only natural that he passes the exam.
examples.translationEn: Since he studies every day, its only natural that he passes the exam
examples.romaji: Kare wa mainichi benkyō shite iru kara, shiken ni gōkaku shite tōzen da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Since he studies every day, its only natural that he passes the exam

examples.sentence: そのレストランは料理が美味しいので、予約がいっぱいになって当然だ。
examples.translation: Because that restaurant’s food is delicious, no wonder its reservations are always full.
examples.translationEn: Because that restaurant’s food is delicious, no wonder its reservations are always full
examples.romaji: Sono resutoran wa ryōri ga oishii node, yoyaku ga ippai ni natte tōzen da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Because that restaurant’s food is delicious, no wonder its reservations are always full

examples.sentence: 彼女は毎晩練習しているので、上手になって当然だ。
examples.translation: She practices every night, so it's natural that she becomes skilled.
examples.translationEn: She practices every night, so its natural that she becomes skilled
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa maiban renshū shite iru node, jōzu ni natte tōzen da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: She practices every night, so its natural that she becomes skilled

examples.sentence: 彼は仕事で成功していて、お金持ちになって当然だ。
examples.translation: He has succeeded at his job, so it's only natural that he's become wealthy.
examples.translationEn: He has succeeded at his job, so its only natural that hes become wealthy
examples.romaji: Kare wa shigoto de seikō shite ite, okanemochi ni natte tōzen da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He has succeeded at his job, so its only natural that hes become wealthy

examples.sentence: 若者の熱情は尊敬に値するというものだ。
examples.translation: The passion of young people is something that deserves respect.
examples.translationEn: The passion of young people is something that deserves respect
examples.romaji: Wakamono no netsujō wa sonkei ni ataisuru to iu mono da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The passion of young people is something that deserves respect

examples.sentence: 勉強は一日でもサボれば遅れるというものだ。
examples.translation: If you skip even a day of studying, you'll fall behind—that's just how it is.
examples.translationEn: If you skip even a day of studying, youll fall behind—thats just how it is
examples.romaji: Benkyō wa ichinichi demo saboreba okureru to iu mono da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If you skip even a day of studying, youll fall behind—thats just how it is

examples.sentence: 成功するためには困難に立ち向かうというものだ。
examples.translation: To succeed, one must face difficulties—that's just the way it is.
examples.translationEn: To succeed, one must face difficulties—thats just the way it is
examples.romaji: Seikō suru tame ni wa konnan ni tachimukau to iu mono da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: To succeed, one must face difficulties—thats just the way it is

examples.sentence: 友情はお金で買えないというものだ。
examples.translation: It is said that friendship cannot be bought with money.
examples.translationEn: It is said that friendship cannot be bought with money
examples.romaji: Yūjō wa okane de kaenai to iu mono da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It is said that friendship cannot be bought with money
